description: Heap use-after-free in SpiderMonkey GC compaction. CVE-2023-29535 (sec-high, MFSA 2023-13, Firefox 112). During GCRuntime::updatePointersToRelocatedCells, FinalizationRegistry observer edges were updated before the weak maps they depend on. When compaction relocated a WeakMap entry, the observer traversal still held the pre-move pointer, yielding a heap-use-after-free on a js::gc::Cell. Regression from bug 1749298 (Firefox 95+). The fix (commit 533d5be1269d680dbef53e0116a917f1a7485e9d by Jon Coppeard, 2023-03-15, r=sfink) reorders the compaction phase so weak maps are updated first, then finalization observer edges. Reporter: Lukas Bernhard.

fixes.description: Bug 1820543 - Update weak maps before finalization observer
